title: Crude hovers near $108 amid US-Iran conflict: How could oil volatility affect your investment portfolio?
summary: Crude prices, which are near $108 per barrel due to the ongoing Middle East conflict, are bound to adversely affect global markets and personal finances. Strategic investing, expense planning, and inflation‑linked assets can help protect portfolios during oil volatility.

title: 8th Pay Commission extends feedback deadline to 31 March: What it means for your salary, pension and allowances
summary: The 8th Pay Commission questionnaire deadline has been extended to 31 March 2026 for employee feedback on pay, pensions and allowances, ensuring comprehensive stakeholder input before final recommendations.

title: War-hit flight disruptions expose travel insurance gaps
summary: Travel insurance is fundamentally designed to cover individual, unforeseen risks, not large-scale geopolitical events

title: Claiming HRA? New rental rules kick in from 1 April — what are the changes and what happens if they are ignored?
summary: Starting 1 April, taxpayers must disclose their relationship with landlords when claiming House Rent Allowance (HRA), especially if rent exceeds ₹1 lakh annually. Here's what happens if you ignore or misreport the details.&nbsp;

title: Women are powering India’s next credit boom; here’s what the data shows
summary: India's credit ecosystem is evolving, with women emerging as a significant force. They represent 27.6% of retail credit and show faster growth rates compared to men.&nbsp;

title: Markets fall, fear rises. Should investors really sit this out?
summary: Market falls trigger fear, but history shows exits often cost more than corrections. The real risk isn’t volatility—it’s missing the rebound while waiting for clarity.

title: Why you must plan for a 30-year retirement
summary: Longer lifespans and shorter careers mean affluent Indians must plan for a 30-year retirement, not 15—requiring disciplined investing, diversified income and strong health coverage.

title: Should you buy home loan insurance? How it works and where to buy
summary: Home loan insurance is structurally similar to a term life insurance policy. In the unfortunate event of the borrower’s death during the policy tenure, the sum assured is paid to the nominee or lender, and this amount can be used to repay the outstanding home loan.

title: Jerome Powell says he will remain US Fed chief until successor confirmed
summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated he will remain in his position until a successor is confirmed and a criminal investigation into the Fed is resolved. Powell's term as chair ends in May, with Kevin Warsh nominated but not yet confirmed by the Senate.

title: Gold price slides below $5,000, drops to over one-month low
summary: Spot gold dropped to a one-month low following the Federal Reserve's decision to hold interest rates steady, with expectations of higher rates for longer. A stronger dollar and ongoing Middle East conflict, including an escalation involving Iran's Pars gas field, further pressured gold prices.

Analysts suggest the new CEO needs more time before further restructuring. The food business, including Knorr and Marmite, reported profits last year.
